title: AI Wins Have Alphabet Poised to Become World’s Biggest Company
description: Over the past year, Alphabet Inc. has gone from an artificial intelligence afterthought to the one firm in the market with dominant positions in nearly every aspect of the technology. Now it’s on the brink of overtaking AI chip giant Nvidia Corp. as the largest company in the world.

title: SK Hynix flooded with unprecedented offers from big tech firms to secure chip supplies
description: Global tech giants are making unprecedented offers to SK Hynix. They want to invest in new production lines and fund expensive equipment purchases. This is to secure vital memory chips. Demand for these chips is surging due to the artificial intelligence boom. SK Hynix is cautious about these deals. The company is reviewing various approaches to secure long-term supply agreements.

title: Congress doing little to prepare for potential AI job losses
description: Economists aren’t sure if or when artificial intelligence will cause widespread job losses.
content:

Economists aren’t sure if or when artificial intelligence will cause widespread job losses. But they do agree on one thing: The federal safety net isn’t ready for such a shock.

title: Colorado lawmakers are poised to scale back the state's AI regulations
description: Colorado lawmakers are poised to rewrite artificial intelligence rules after closed-door negotiations by business groups, tech companies like Google, and consumer protection and progressive groups.
content:
